title: Jacob Hookem
extract:
Jacob Hookem (born 4 October 2002) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a hooker, scrum-half or stand-off for the Dewsbury Rams in the RFL Championship.
He has previously played for Hull F.C. and Castleford Tigers in the Super League, and at Whitehaven, Bradford Bulls and Midlands Hurricanes.
